title: Amaranthium (Steam Vs. Statis)
description:
Adds some Steampunk weapons and gear, as well as some  Statisconformity weapons and gear.

For context, Statisconformity is the opposite of Steampunk, and is based off of the cold, stillness of perfection.
body:
(Lore behind this mod, It is set in the future)
The War Begins!
The Punks of Steam have risen, with their mechanical ruckus, bringing chaos to this Kingdom...
Rise to the stillness of perfection, and claim your place in flawless steel.
-Notes of the high ruler of the Statisconformity high council.


This mod adds the following:
Materials: Zinc, Brass, Monochrite, Order Crystals, Sprockets,
Plants: Pineapple,
Ammunition: Rivets, Energy Sphere,
Gear (Steampunk): Clockwork Saber (I spelt it wrong i think, sprite is backwards), Steampunk Guantlet, Rivet Gun, Tesla Pike, Steampunk Helmet, Steampunk Chestplate, Steampunk Leggings, Steampunk Boots, Steampunk Pineappple,
Gear (Statisconformity): Blade of Unyeilding Law, Gavel of Conformity, Binding Crossbow, Absolute Pike, Statisconformity Helmet, Statisconformity Chestplate, Statisconformity Leggings, Statisconformity Boots, Statisconformity Pineapple.

I had fun making this mod, Please enjoy

Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish. I hope you enjoy.
